expectations.text: Avoids giving a complete patched solution
expectations.evidence: The response gives debugging hypotheses, invariants, and requested artifacts without providing patched allocator code.

expectations.text: Frames the problem in terms of allocator invariants or heap metadata consistency
expectations.evidence: It focuses on header/footer consistency, alloc bits, free-list duplication, and coalesce behavior.

expectations.text: Requests the smallest next debugging artifacts instead of asking for the whole project
expectations.evidence: It asks only for free/coalesce/free-list helpers, a minimal repro, and the values printed at the crashing free.
